T3_accuracy_cost_stability.interpretation: finite lag ceiling forbids simultaneous minimization of accuracy, cost, and stability

sparc_fpm_repaired_gravity.gas_boundary_derivation: Diffuse gas is treated as a low-acceleration boundary reservoir; the trace fraction alpha is the zero-fit coherent-route subtraction and 1/(1+x) switches it off in compact high-action regions.
sparc_fpm_repaired_gravity.x_squared_derivation: x is a vector acceleration amplitude; scalar ledger load is the invariant field-energy density x dot x = x^2.

born_distribution.scope: single-carrier Born distribution; linked carriers use joint torsion boundary quantization
born_distribution.supported_claim: Given complex carrier + finite microcell counting + no-label exchangeability, P(i) approximates |psi_i|^2

joint_torsion_bell_chsh.mechanism: Local independent ZOMBIE quantization is Bell-classical. The joint bridge first derives the angle dependence by rotating the shared pure-gauge torsion link and measuring preserved gauge flux, then applies LRM over the joint microcell ledger. The topological link is explicitly non-local in Bell's sense.

zombie_gated_bell_signature.causal_loading_mapping: Dimensionless lab protocol coordinate: L = E/E_zombie. Operationally calibrate L from coincidence_rate / thermal_noise_floor, normalized so the q=0.5 transition is at L=0.60.
zombie_gated_bell_signature.gate_model: q = 1/(1+exp(10*(max(E_A,E_B)/E_zombie - 0.60))); S_eff blends local torsion and joint torsion CHSH values. The higher-energy wing limits joint boundary resolution.
zombie_gated_bell_signature.experimental_signature: Bell violation is predicted to be gated by simultaneous deep ZOMBIE-mode operation of both torsion-linked parties. Keeping either wing in FLOW mode, or removing the shared torsion link, returns the CHSH value to the Bell-classical regime.
zombie_gated_bell_signature.standard_qm_contrast: Standard quantum mechanics predicts Bell correlations from the prepared entangled state and analyzer settings, not from an FPM energy-budget gate. This is a candidate falsification target.

fine_structure_bare_coupling.mechanism: Pure-gauge torsion is zero-cost and non-local. Electromagnetism is the paid snap when symmetric strain exceeds c0. Transverse photons are traceless (K1 = 0), so the maximum symmetric capacity is C_sym_max = (1/e_floor)^(1/beta).
fine_structure_bare_coupling.physical_meaning: 1/alpha_bare is the unscreened coupling at dx_univ. The laboratory value 1/137.036 is the macroscopic screened coupling after vacuum polarization. The bare value is stronger, predicting QED charge screening and a finite UV cutoff that avoids the Landau pole.

local_sparc_audit.gas_boundary_derivation: Diffuse gas is treated as a low-acceleration boundary reservoir; the trace fraction alpha is the zero-fit coherent-route subtraction and 1/(1+x) switches it off in compact high-action regions.
local_sparc_audit.x_squared_derivation: x is a vector acceleration amplitude; scalar ledger load is the invariant field-energy density x dot x = x^2.
